data.name: KanbanBoard_Desc
data.value: Dataset control that renders records as Kanban cards grouped by a choice/status column. Drag cards between columns to update status.

data.name: cards_Display
data.comment: Display name for the bound dataset

data.name: cards_Desc
data.value: The records to display as Kanban cards.

data.name: statusColumn_Display
data.comment: Display name for the status column property

data.name: statusColumn_Desc
data.value: Logical name of the choice or status column to group cards by (e.g. statuscode, prioritycode).
data.comment: Description for the status column property

data.name: titleColumn_Display
data.comment: Display name for the title column property

data.name: titleColumn_Desc
data.value: Optional logical name of the column shown as the card title. Defaults to the entity's primary name column.
data.comment: Description for the title column property

data.name: subtitleColumn_Display
data.comment: Display name for the subtitle column property

data.name: subtitleColumn_Desc
data.value: Optional logical name of the column shown below the card title.
data.comment: Description for the subtitle column property

data.name: descriptionColumn_Display
data.comment: Display name for the description column property

data.name: descriptionColumn_Desc
data.value: Optional logical name of a longer text column shown as the card body.
data.comment: Description for the description column property

data.name: allowDragDrop_Display
data.comment: Display name for the drag/drop toggle

data.name: allowDragDrop_Desc
data.value: If true, users can drag cards between columns to change the status. Default: true.

data.name: allowCreate_Display
data.comment: Display name for the create toggle

data.name: allowCreate_Desc
data.value: If true, each column shows a "+" button that opens the quick-create form pre-populated with that status. Default: true.
